description: Returns the Permission Template along with its permitted actions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the permission template to be retrieved

id.description: The ID of the Permission Template

company_id.description: The ID of the Company the Permission Template belongs to

name.description: The name of the Permission Template

provider_id.description: Either the company_id or project_id based on provider_type

category.description: The category of the Permission Template

user_access_levels.description: user access levels for active tools

project_id.description: id of corresponding project if provider_type == Project
